log.newDesc: Acceleration calculator. Solve a = Δv / Δt for acceleration, initial velocity, final velocity, or time, with worked examples.
Actual yield calculator with a live 3D beaker showing recovered product vs the theoretical fill line and the lost portion.
Calculate air changes per hour for a room from its volume and ventilation airflow rate (CFM).
Amino acid sequence analyzer. Solve amino acid composition, hydrophobicity percentage, and estimated net charge at physiological pH, with worked examples.
Find the sample size and accept/reject numbers for an apparel quality inspection using ISO 2859-1 (ANSI/ASQ Z1.4) General Inspection Level II.
Arrhenius equation calculator. Find the rate constant k = Ae^(-Ea/RT), or find Ea from two (T,k) points, with worked examples.
Look up the Autonomous System Number (ASN) and network owner for any IP address. Fetches live data from the RIR databases and shows the organization.
Atom calculator: find protons, neutrons and electrons from atomic number, mass number and charge, or identify an atom from its particle counts.
Free molar mass calculator with a live 3D atom cluster and charts. Enter any chemical formula to get molar mass, per-element breakdown.
Atomic mass calculator. Look up any element's standard atomic weight, atomic number, and estimated proton/neutron count, with worked examples.
Average velocity calculator. Solve v_avg = Δx / Δt from displacement and time, with worked examples and the average-velocity-vs-average-speed distinction.
Avogadro's number calculator. Convert moles to particle count (N = n×N_A) or mass to particle count via molar mass, with worked examples.
Bacterial growth rate calculator. Solve the specific growth rate constant k = ln(Nt/N0)/t from population counts at two time points, with worked examples.
Free battery runtime calculator. Estimate how long a battery will power your device based on battery capacity (mAh/Ah) and device current draw or power.
Bernoulli's equation calculator. Find pressure at a second point in a flowing fluid from velocity and elevation changes, with worked examples.
Biomass calculator: find total biomass from population count and average mass, or from population density and area, with worked examples.
Boiling point elevation calculator. Solve ΔTb = i·Kb·m for how much a solute raises a solvent's boiling point.
Estimate the tightening torque for a bolt from its diameter, thread pitch, friction coefficient and target clamp load.
Bond energy calculator. Estimate ΔH_rxn from average bond energies of up to 4 bonds broken and 4 bonds formed.
Free browser and device info tool — instantly see your browser, OS, screen resolution, device type, language, timezone, connection type.
Buoyancy calculator with a live 3D floating/sinking object and charts. Solve F_b = ρ·V·g, find floating vs sinking and the submerged fraction.
Calorimetry calculator with a live 3D calorimeter cup and charts. Solve q_water = mcΔT, find q_reaction = −q_water, and the molar heat of reaction.
Capacitance calculator. Solve C = Q/V or the parallel-plate formula C = ε₀εᵣA/d, plus stored energy, with worked examples.
Cell doubling time calculator: solve doubling time and population doubling level (PDL) for mammalian cell culture, with worked examples.
Cell EMF calculator. Find the standard cell potential from cathode and anode reduction potentials, plus Gibbs free energy and spontaneity, with worked examples.
Cellular respiration calculator: balance C6H12O6 + 6O2 to 6CO2 + 6H2O for any amount of glucose and estimate ATP yield, with worked examples.
Centripetal force calculator with a live 3D orbiting mass and charts. Solve Fc = mv²/r for force, mass, velocity, or radius, with worked examples for cars.
CFU per mL calculator: solve CFU/mL = colonies x dilution factor / volume plated for bacterial concentration, with the 30-300 countable-range rule.
Charles's Law calculator with a live 3D expanding balloon and charts. Solve V1/T1 = V2/T2 for any variable.
Chi-square genetics calculator: test whether observed offspring counts fit a predicted ratio like 3:1 or 9:3:3:1, with Mendel's pea data as an example.
Generate formatted citations in APA, MLA, and Chicago styles for books, websites, journals, and more.
Codominance calculator. Build a Punnett square for codominant alleles (like roan cattle or AB blood type), where both alleles show fully, with worked examples.
Codon usage calculator. Tally codon frequencies from an mRNA sequence and reveal synonymous codon bias for each amino acid, with worked examples.
Free CPS test — measure your mouse clicking speed in clicks per second. Choose from 1s, 5s, 10s, 30s and 60s test modes.
Free real-time currency converter with 50+ currencies, live exchange rates via ECB, searchable dropdowns, and popular-pair grid.
Dalton's Law of partial pressures calculator. Sum up to 4 partial pressures, or find partial pressures from mole fractions.
Dihybrid cross calculator. Build the full 16-cell two-gene Punnett square from AaBb × AaBb, with the classic 9:3:3:1 phenotype ratio and worked examples.
Dilution calculator with a live 3D beaker and charts. Solve C₁V₁ = C₂V₂ for any variable, get plain-English "how much water to add" steps.
DNA base-pairing calculator: apply Watson-Crick rules to find complementary DNA and RNA strands, plus hydrogen-bond count and a Chargaff check.
DNA/RNA concentration calculator: convert A260 absorbance to nucleic acid concentration via Beer-Lambert, with A260/A280 and A260/A230 purity ratios.
DNA melting temperature calculator. Compute Tm using the Wallace rule (4(G+C)+2(A+T)) for short oligonucleotides, with worked examples.
DNA to mRNA transcription tool. Convert a DNA template strand into its complementary mRNA sequence, with worked examples and base-pairing rules.
Free domain health checker — instantly audit DNS records, SPF & DMARC email security, SSL certificate grade, website availability, and blacklist status.
Doppler effect calculator. Solve f_obs = f_source × v_sound / (v_sound ∓ v_source) for an approaching or receding sound source, with worked examples.
Drop files, links and text into a shared room with a simple code — no login, no app. Up to 50 MB, syncs across Wi-Fi, mobile data and any network.
Real-time earthquake map and list powered by combined USGS and GEOFON (GFZ) data. Filter by magnitude and time range, view depth and felt reports.
Elastic collision calculator. Solve final velocities v1' and v2' for a 1D elastic collision, with kinetic energy conservation checked automatically.
Electric field calculator. Solve E = F/q or E = kQ/r² for field strength, force, charge, or distance, with worked examples.
Electron configuration calculator: find the full Aufbau-order configuration, noble-gas shorthand and valence electron count for any element.
Paste raw email headers to analyze the delivery path, extract sender, recipient, subject, date, and authentication results.
Energy pyramid calculator: solve energy available at each trophic level using the 10% rule, showing why food chains rarely exceed 4-5 levels.
Calculate reaction enthalpy ΔH_rxn from standard enthalpies of formation. Up to 2 reactants and 2 products, with worked examples.
Calculate reaction entropy ΔS_rxn from standard molar entropies with static 3D order/disorder diagrams and charts.
Escape velocity calculator. Solve v_esc = √(2GM/r) for Earth, the Moon, Mars, the Sun and custom bodies, with worked examples.
Exponential population growth calculator. Solve N(t) = N₀e^(rt) for unconstrained population growth, with worked examples and doubling-time calculations.
Faraday's law of electrolysis calculator: find the mass of metal deposited or dissolved from current, time, molar mass and electrons transferred.
Estimate the needed fire flow in gallons per minute for a building using the National Fire Academy fireground formula, with floors.
Calculate the Floor Area Ratio (FAR) of a building from its total floor area and lot size, and find the maximum buildable floor area allowed under a.
Estimate the maximum span for a floor joist from its nominal size and on-center spacing, following simplified IRC/NDS joist span table guidance for common.
Newton's second law calculator with a live 3D push simulator and charts. Solve F = ma for force, mass or acceleration.
Free fall calculator with a live 3D drop simulator and charts. Find time, final velocity and distance fallen for an object dropped under gravity (no air.
Freezing point depression calculator. Solve ΔTf = i·Kf·m for how much a solute lowers a solvent's freezing point.
Frequency calculator. Solve f = 1/T for frequency or period of any repeating motion, plus angular frequency (ω = 2πf) and RPM, with worked examples.
Find how many gallons you need to cover an area from the product coverage rate — for paint, sealer, stain, primer and driveway coatings.
Combined gas law calculator. Solve P1V1/T1 = P2V2/T2, plus mode switches for Boyle's law and Charles's law alone, with worked examples.
Gay-Lussac's Law calculator with static 3D diagrams and charts. Solve P1/T1 = P2/T2 for any variable.
GC content calculator. Compute GC% = (G+C)/total bases × 100 for any DNA sequence, with worked examples and organism GC% comparisons.
Generation time calculator. Solve g = t/n for microbial generation (doubling) time from population counts, using n = log2(Nt/N0), with worked examples.
Genetic drift calculator: solve heterozygosity decay Ht=H0(1-1/2N)^t under random drift and simulate random allele-frequency trajectories.
Genotype frequency calculator. Compute observed genotype and allele frequencies directly from population counts (AA, Aa, aa), with worked examples.
Gibbs free energy calculator. Solve ΔG = ΔH − TΔS for any variable, and find the crossover temperature where a reaction flips spontaneous.
Newton's law of gravitation calculator. Solve F = Gm1m2/r² for the gravitational force between two masses, with worked examples for Earth, the Moon.
Half-life calculator. Solve for remaining quantity, initial quantity, elapsed time, or half-life using exponential decay.
Hardy-Weinberg calculator. Solve p²+2pq+q²=1 for allele and genotype frequencies in a population, with worked examples for recessive disease carrier rates.
Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium checker. Run a chi-square goodness-of-fit test comparing observed genotype counts to Hardy-Weinberg-expected counts.
Ideal gas law calculator. Solve PV=nRT for pressure, volume, moles, or temperature, with STP presets and worked examples.
Impulse calculator. Solve J = FΔt = Δp = mΔv for force, time, or momentum change, with worked examples and a force-vs-time area view.
Incomplete dominance calculator. Build a Punnett square where heterozygotes show a blended intermediate phenotype, like pink flowers from red and white parents.
Perfectly inelastic collision calculator. Solve the combined final velocity v' = (m1u1 + m2u2)/(m1+m2) and see exactly how much kinetic energy is lost.
Free invoice generator: create professional invoices with 5 templates, signature, line items, tax and payment status. Download as PDF, no sign-up.
Calculate the geographic distance between two IP addresses. Uses IP geolocation data to find the coordinates of each IP and computes the great-circle.
Free IP geolocation tool. Look up any IP address — see location, ISP, ASN, timezone, currency and an interactive Leaflet map.
Isotope calculator: find protons, neutrons and electrons from atomic and mass number, or compute weighted average atomic mass from isotope abundances.
Calculate the acid dissociation constant Ka, estimate [H+] and pH from Ka and initial concentration.
Free online keyboard tester — press any key to see it light up instantly. Detect stuck, broken or unregistered keys.
Kinetic energy calculator. Solve KE = ½mv² for kinetic energy, mass, or velocity, with worked examples and a crash-energy comparison table.
Logistic growth calculator. Solve the logistic growth equation for population size over time as it approaches a carrying capacity, with worked examples.
Magnetic force calculator. Find the force on a moving charge (F = qvB sinθ) or a current-carrying wire (F = BIL sinθ), with worked examples.
Mark-recapture calculator: solve the Lincoln-Petersen index N=(MxC)/R for population size, plus the small-sample Chapman correction.
Michaelis-Menten enzyme kinetics calculator. Solve v = Vmax[S]/(Km+[S]) for reaction velocity, with worked examples and the classic saturation curve.
Microbial growth curve plotter. Model the four classic bacterial growth phases — lag, log, stationary, and death — from your own parameters.
Microscope magnification calculator. Solve total magnification (eyepiece x objective), field of view at any power, and actual specimen size.
Mirror equation calculator. Solve 1/f = 1/do + 1/di for image distance and magnification in concave and convex mirrors, with worked examples.
Mitosis stage identifier. Answer a short dichotomous key to identify prophase, metaphase, anaphase, or telophase from observed cell features.
Molality calculator with a live 3D beaker and charts. Solve m = moles of solute ÷ kilograms of solvent.
Free mole ratio calculator with a live 3D particle-pile view and charts. Enter the coefficients of two species in a balanced equation and moles of one to.
Free molecular formula calculator with a live 3D atom cluster and charts. Enter an empirical formula and actual molar mass to find the molecular formula.
Moment of inertia calculator with a live 3D spinning shape and charts. Compute I for a solid sphere, disk/cylinder, rod, or hoop from mass and radius.
Momentum calculator with a live 3D momentum arrow and charts. Solve p = mv and the impulse–momentum theorem Δp = FΔt.
mRNA to protein translation tool. Translate an mRNA sequence into its amino acid chain using the standard genetic code.
Natural selection calculator: model how selection against a recessive phenotype shifts allele frequency over generations using q(t+1)=q(1-sq)/(1-sq2).
Neutralization reaction calculator: mix an acid and base by concentration and volume to find excess H+ or OH- and whether the result is acidic or basic.
Ohm's law calculator. Solve V=IR, plus all three power formulas, for voltage, current, resistance, or power, with worked examples.
Orbital velocity calculator. Solve v = √(GM/r) for the speed of a circular orbit, with presets for LEO, GEO, the Moon, and Mars, plus worked examples.
Osmosis and tonicity calculator: compare intracellular and extracellular solute levels to predict water movement and whether a cell swells or shrinks.
PCR annealing temperature calculator. Estimate primer Tm via the Wallace rule and the recommended annealing temperature (Ta = Tm − 5°C), with worked examples.
Pedigree chart analyzer: answer a short decision tree about how a trait runs through generations to infer its most likely inheritance pattern.
Percent concentration calculator with a live 3D beaker and charts. Solve mass/volume (w/v), mass/mass (w/w) and volume/volume (v/v) percent.
Calculate the perimeter of rectangles, squares, circles, and triangles from your measurements.
Interactive periodic table of all 118 elements with a live 3D atom diagram and trend charts.
pH calculator. Calculate pH from hydrogen ion concentration [H⁺] or find [H⁺] from pH, with worked examples for strong acids and bases.
pH enzyme activity calculator: model relative enzyme activity across a pH range with a bell curve around the optimum, with pepsin and trypsin examples.
Photosynthesis rate calculator: solve gross and net O2 output from light intensity using a saturation curve, plus the light compensation point.
Simple phylogenetic tree builder. Build a UPGMA distance-based tree from a binary character matrix.
Measure HTTP round-trip latency to popular internet endpoints from your browser. Results show response time in milliseconds for each target — useful for.
Population density calculator. Solve D = N/A for individuals per unit area, with worked examples comparing sparse and dense populations.
Check whether common network ports (80, 443, 22, 21, 25) are reachable on any hostname. Best-effort reachability check using HTTP fetches for HTTP/HTTPS.
Gravitational potential energy calculator. Solve PE = mgh for potential energy, mass, height, or gravity, with worked examples across different planets.
Electrical power calculator. Solve P=VI, P=I²R, and P=V²/R for power, voltage, current, or resistance, with worked examples and an energy-cost table.
Accurate Islamic prayer times (Fajr, Sunrise, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha) for any city worldwide.
Predator-prey simulator. Solve the Lotka-Volterra equilibrium point and simulate oscillating predator and prey populations over time, with worked examples.
Free present value and future value calculator. Calculate the time value of money — what a future sum is worth today or what a present sum will grow to.
Free projectile motion calculator with a live 3D trajectory simulator and charts. Find range, max height.
Protein molecular weight calculator. Solve total protein mass from an amino acid sequence by summing residue masses, with worked examples.
Punnett square calculator. Build a full monohybrid cross grid from two parent genotypes, with genotype/phenotype ratios and worked examples.
Rate constant calculator. Solve k = rate / ([A]^m[B]^n) for the rate constant of a reaction given its rate law, reaction orders, and concentrations.
Calculate the reaction quotient Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b at any point in a reaction, compare it to Kc.
Reaction rate calculator with a live 3D particle-density visual and charts. Solve rate = |Δ[X]| / (coefficient × Δt) for a reactant or product.
Recombination frequency calculator. Compute RF% from recombinant vs parental offspring counts to detect gene linkage and estimate genetic map distance.
Restriction enzyme cut-site finder. Scan a DNA sequence for common restriction enzyme recognition sites (EcoRI, BamHI, HindIII, and more), with worked examples.
Reverse complement calculator. Find the reverse complement of any DNA sequence, with worked examples and a step-by-step complement-then-reverse breakdown.
Free premium SEO audit tool. Analyze any webpage for content quality, technical SEO, performance, accessibility, schema markup.
Serial dilution calculator. Solve per-step and cumulative dilution factor across a series, plus final concentration, with worked examples.
Series resistor calculator with a live 3D resistor chain and charts. Solve R_total = R1 + R2 + ...
Sex-linked trait calculator. Build an X-linked Punnett square from mother and father genotypes, with worked examples for carrier mothers and color blindness.
Shannon diversity index calculator. Solve H' = −Σ(pᵢ ln pᵢ) to measure species diversity in an ecological community, with worked examples and evenness.
Simple harmonic motion calculator. Find displacement, velocity, and acceleration at any instant from amplitude, angular frequency, and time.
Snell's law calculator with a live 3D bending light ray and charts. Solve n1 sinθ1 = n2 sinθ2 for any variable.
Free Social Security calculator. Estimate your monthly retirement benefit based on your earnings history and claiming age.
Sound intensity calculator: convert between intensity (W/m2) and decibels, and apply the inverse-square law to find intensity at a new distance.
Speciation rate estimator. Solve net diversification rate r = ln(N/N0)/t for a clade's species richness over geological time, with worked examples.
Specific heat calculator with 3D diagrams and charts. Solve c = Q/(mΔT) to find specific heat capacity, heat energy, mass, or temperature change.
Surface area-to-volume ratio calculator. Compute SA:V for a cube-shaped cell model and see why cells stay small, with worked examples across increasing sizes.
Terminal velocity calculator. Solve v_t = √(2mg / (ρ·A·Cd)) for skydivers, raindrops and more, with worked examples.
Theoretical yield calculator with a live 3D reactant-to-product visualization and charts. Calculate theoretical yield from mass.
Thermal expansion calculator: find change in length from a material's expansion coefficient, original length and temperature change, with presets.
Thin lens equation calculator with a live solver for focal length, object distance, or image distance, plus magnification.
Titration calculator. Solve M_acid x V_acid x n_acid = M_base x V_base x n_base for any variable, with worked examples.
Torque calculator with a live 3D lever arm and charts. Solve τ = rFsinθ for torque, lever arm, force, or angle, with worked examples for wrenches, doors.
Trihybrid cross calculator. Build the full 8×8 AaBbCc × AaBbCc grid and the classic 27:9:9:9:3:3:3:1 phenotype ratio, with worked examples.
Free typing speed test: measure your WPM and accuracy in real time with four durations, four text modes, difficulty levels and live feedback.
Uniform circular motion calculator with a live 3D orbit and charts. From radius, speed and mass find angular velocity, period, frequency.
Parse and analyze any browser user agent string. Identify the browser, version, operating system, device type, and engine — all client-side.
Vapor pressure calculator. Solve Raoult's law for vapor pressure lowering from a dissolved solute, or total vapor pressure for an ideal two-liquid mixture.
Free voltage drop calculator. Calculate voltage drop across wires based on material (copper/aluminum), length.
Wave speed calculator. Solve v = f×λ for wave speed, frequency, or wavelength, with worked examples for sound in air and water.
Wavelength calculator. Solve v = fλ for wave velocity, frequency, or wavelength — works for sound, light, and radio waves — with worked examples.
Weight on other planets calculator. Enter a mass and see your weight (W = mg) on Mercury, Venus, Earth, the Moon, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus.
Work calculator. Solve W = Fd cos(θ) for work done by a force at any angle, with worked examples and an angle-efficiency comparison table.
Work-energy theorem calculator. Solve W_net = ΔKE = ½m(v_f²−v_i²) for net work, mass, initial velocity, or final velocity, with worked examples.
Decode the details of an X.509 SSL/TLS certificate in PEM format, including issuer, validity dates, subject, and public key.
Convert yarn thickness between English cotton count (Ne) and denier instantly. Enter a value in either unit to get the accurate conversion for spinning.
